phase: themes-v2 phase 5.3 — locked baseline (flag-off, post-PR3 frontend)
deployedMainNote: Main HEAD at the 2026-06-04 capture was b2e42b8 (#485, Phase 5.3 equivalence harness — scripts/themes_v2/ only). The last commit touching backend RUNTIME code was #484 (PR-2: sections_json reorder + customer_form->confirm_summary rename, 4a2aa2f). The commits between PR-2 and this lock (#485 equivalence harness; #486 harness deploy-noise masks + CRLF safety) touched only harness scripts, git line-ending/tracking metadata, snapshot files, and one documentation note (docs/themes-v2-backend-stable-key-order.md, recording the known non-stable serializer key-order that the harness masks) — no runtime code paths. Render auto-deploys main; the live-at-capture SHA was not independently verified — rendered-output equivalence to the retired 06-02 baseline is proven empirically by Gate 2 forensics (zero content/seam/branding deltas).

annotations.description: PR-3 CSS chunk-split: eec87baed4a6da6d.css → 0f9c61b7… + d3d053c8…; head <link rel="stylesheet"> count 2 → 3; uniform across all 7 tenants. Accepted PR-3 build-graph footprint — recorded in this MANIFEST, deliberately not normalized away in 07.js.
abz snapshotVersion 21 → 22 plus the publishedAt timestamp are baked into this baseline as an owned publish event captured at lock time. Deliberately unmasked downstream — see annotation (c).

Harness rule #15 removed in PR #486 (commit 24bbf2d). snapshotVersion and publishedAt fields are now deliberately unmasked in scripts/themes_v2/07_diff_against_baseline.js — they function as publish-event canaries. Future diffs that surface these fields against this baseline are signal, not noise.

harnessReference.harnessHeadSubject: fix(themes-v2): harness deploy-noise masks + CRLF baseline safety (#486)
harnessReference.note: scripts/themes_v2/07_diff_against_baseline.js at this SHA — or any later SHA that preserves the post-#486 rule set — is the diff contract for this baseline.

verification.rationale: Phase 5.3 Gates 3–6 exercise this baseline; per-tenant verdicts are recorded by those gates.
verification.reverificationInstructions: Run captureCommand into a fresh --output-dir, then scripts/themes_v2/07_diff_against_baseline.js --baseline-dir=snapshots/2026-06-04-flag-off-postPR3 --current-dir=<fresh-dir>. Expect 7/7 PASS while Vercel deploy is a4f7613 and backend remains runtime-equivalent to PR-2.

notes: INDEX.json is the immutable capture record; this MANIFEST is the lock-time artifact authored at generatedAt above. INDEX.json must not be modified after capture — its embedded hashes cross-check the sidecars.
Sidecars (*.sha256) exist only for the gitignored *.html and *.api.json files. INDEX.json and this MANIFEST receive integrity from git tracking; no sidecars are emitted for them.
Supersedes snapshots/2026-06-02-flag-off (retired in the same commit that authors this MANIFEST).

Raw bytes encode wall-clock capture moment (per-request Sentry trace_ids and cache-warmth, plus the deliberately-unmasked snapshotVersion / publishedAt — see annotations b and c). The verified-equivalence claim holds at the normalizer's output, not at raw sha256.

Protected tenants (3 = birdie-golf, 21 = alrazi, 33 = karamhomes) ship branding changes through a stricter review and are an attention prior when triaging future DIFF verdicts; Phase 5.3 protocol bars data scripts against them.
